---
title: "Week 3 — Hands-on bioinformatics I"
subtitle: "Code and data analysis with an AI assistant in the loop"
---

## Topics

- AI-assisted scripting for bioinformatics.
- AI-assisted QC and EDA on a real dataset.
- Keeping ownership of scientific judgment.

## Before class

Read:

- [Code assistance](../bioinformatics/code-assistance.qmd)
- [Data analysis](../bioinformatics/data-analysis.qmd)

Setup:

- Ensure you have a working R or Python environment, and access to at least one coding AI assistant (Claude, Copilot, Cursor, etc.).

## In class

- Pair programming session with AI.
- Walkthrough: QC pass on a small RNA-seq (or scRNA-seq) dataset.

## After class

- **Mini-project** *(20% of grade)*: complete a scoped bioinformatics task with AI assistance. Submit a reproducible Quarto/Jupyter report including: the task statement, your prompt history (abridged is fine), the analysis, and a disclosure statement.

## Supplementary

*TODO: dataset link, starter repo.*
